title: sambucus racemosa var. maritima
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. maritima, also known as the coastal or Pacific American elder, is a variety of the elder shrub that is native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa var. maritima include relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as support for respiratory health and the nervous system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and fight off illness.
